build.buildCommand: curl -fsSL https://github.com/yarnpkg/yarn/releases/download/v1.22.22/yarn-1.22.22.js -o /tmp/yarn-classic-1.22.22.js && yarn install && rm -rf node_modules/@types/mapbox-gl node_modules/@types/simpl-schema ckEditor/node_modules/@types/mapbox-gl ckEditor/node_modules/@types/simpl-schema && bash -c 'set -euo pipefail; mv package.json package.json.docker-bk; mv yarn.lock yarn.lock.docker-bk; cleanup() { mv package.json.docker-bk package.json 2>/dev/null || true; mv yarn.lock.docker-bk yarn.lock 2>/dev/null || true; }; trap cleanup EXIT; (cd ckEditor && env -i HOME=$HOME PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin node /tmp/yarn-classic-1.22.22.js install --frozen-lockfile); (cd ckEditor && env -i HOME=$HOME PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin node /tmp/yarn-classic-1.22.22.js run build); trap - EXIT; cleanup; yarn build'
